title: Cognizant Technology Solutions Has Solved Its Margin Worries
text: Cognizant posted a strong quarter with its growing digital operation and beating its strong FY2021 figures. It enjoys a growing human resource catalyst and booking which makes its topline growth sustainable.

title: Etsy, Cognizant, and EBay Were Thursday's Biggest Losers. Here's How They Look Today.
text: Growth in the e-commerce sector is slowing following a Covid-19 pandemic-fueled boom.

title: Why Cognizant Technology Solutions Stock Tanked 13% Today
text: Lackluster earnings, combined with a widespread market meltdown, brought this stock down.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: Cognizant's (CTSH) first-quarter 2022 results benefit from strong digital revenues and robust contribution from acquisitions.

title: Cognizant to Present at MoffettNathanson's 4th Annual Payments, Processors, and IT Services Summit
text: TEANECK, N.J. , May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH), a leading provider of information technology, consulting, and business process services, today announced a presentation at the following investor conference: MoffettNathanson's 4th Annual Payments, Processors, and IT Services Summit  Presenter:       Brian Humphries - Chief Executive Officer Date:               Thursday, May 12, 2022 Time:               1:00 PM ET Live audio webcasts of the presentations will be available at Cognizant's website:  http://investors.cognizant.com A replay of the webcasts will remain available on the company's website for 90 days.

title: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (CTSH) CEO Brian Humphries on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Tyler Scott - Vice President, Investor Relations Brian Humphries - Chief Executive Officer Jan Siegmund - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Tien-Tsin Huang - JPMorgan Bryan Bergin - Cowen and Company Moshe Katri - Wedbush Securities Lisa Ellis - MoffettNathanson Ashwin Shirvaikar - Citigroup Inc. Rod Bourgeois - DeepDive Equity Research Brian Essex - Goldman Sachs Keith Bachman - BMO Capital Markets Bryan Keane - Deutsche Bank Operator Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the Cognizant Technology Solutions Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All lines have been placed on mute to prevent any background noise.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) Tops Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Cognizant (CTSH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.85% and 0%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Cognizant Technology Stock Slips After Hours On Mixed Q1 Results, Below Par Q2 Outlook
text: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp (NASDAQ: CTSH) reported first-quarter revenue growth of 9.7% year-over-year to $4.8 billion and +10.9% in constant currency, marginally missing the consensus of $4.83 billion. Adjusted EPS improved to $1.08 from $0.97 in 1Q21, beating the consensus.
